response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings strong full-stack engineering fundamentals and relevant language experience (TypeScript, C#, Java, C/C++), with high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby and recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. However, the resume contains no evidence of experimentation platform engineering, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging systems, telemetry pipelines, or growth measurement frameworks — the core competencies this Principal-level role demands. At IC6, deep domain expertise in experimentation and growth systems is expected, and the candidate's history skews heavily toward product engineering, GIS platforms, and developer tooling rather than the systematic experimentation and measurement systems this position is built around.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience across multiple domains with demonstrated proficiency in relevant languages including TypeScript, C#, Java, and C/C++
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O and low-latency data infrastructure
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq shows adaptability to emerging developer platforms
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience is mentioned anywhere in the resume
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or statistical/experimental analysis background is evident — all of which are core to this role's responsibilities

Seniority trajectory sits at Staff SE rather than Principal, and the breadth-over-depth career pattern does not demonstrate the focused technical leadership in growth or measurement systems expected at IC6

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
